source_jobs.title: Software Engineer, Fullstack
source_jobs.description:
JOIN US IN BUILDING THE FUTURE OF DIGITAL WORK

At Sola, we’re transforming the way work is done. We’re developing AI agents that make powerful automation effortless, enabling any user to record a workflow and instantly scale it up to millions of executions.

Sola today powers enterprise workflows in Fortune 100 companies, with a horizontal platform that works across healthcare, finance, legal, logistics, and more. We’ve raised $21M in funding from a16z, Conviction (Sarah Guo), and Y Combinator, and are looking for passionate engineers to help us continue to scale.

If you’re interested in being on the forefront of agentic automation, we’d love to hear from you!


WHAT TO EXPECT

Our goal is to bring Figma-level UI/UX excellence to enterprise AI workflow automation.

As a full-stack engineer, you'll own features end-to-end — from the backend APIs that power workflow execution to the intuitive, polished UI that makes automation accessible to non-technical users. You'll partner closely with product and design to craft experiences that feel effortless, while making thoughtful tradeoffs across the stack.

This is an opportunity to join a small, tight-knit team at our HQ in NYC. We believe the best work happens in person, especially at the early stage, and you'll have the opportunity to learn from the founding team and early engineers to help shape the future of the company.


WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Own features end-to-end, from customer request to design to production, making thoughtful tradeoffs across frontend and backend

 - Collaborate with our CTO and ML research partners to bring state-of-the-art agentic features into production

 - Work on a wide variety of frontend surfaces, from our browser extension recorder, to the workflow editor, and dashboard analytics reporting on workflow execution

 - Design and build the backend APIs and services that power the editor and integrate with Sola's AI orchestration and execution platform

 - Partner with product and design to craft intuitive, delightful user experiences for both technical and non-technical users


WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - You thrive in a fast-paced environment where you can ship fast and solve problems end-to-end

 - You're fluent in TypeScript, Python, and React, and can move confidently across the stack

 - You have a strong background in client-side technologies and care deeply about UI/UX quality

 - You've built and operated production systems with a high standard for reliability, monitoring, and performance

 - You're fluent with the latest AI coding tools and are always looking for ways to move faster

 - You're open to working 5 days a week out of our office in NYC (we'll cover relocation!)


YOU MIGHT EXCEL IF

 - You have hands-on experience operating at an early stage startup where ownership and execution in the face of ambiguity were essential

 - You’re a fullstack generalist, with specific experience in some or all of our stack: React, Typescript, Python, Kubernetes, Temporal, Postgres, DynamoDB

 - You've worked on building out enterprise SaaS features (e.g. SCIM, RBAC, audit logging) and enterprise integrations

 - You're an expert in browser extensions or session capture tech

 - You’re ambitious, creative, and a great communicator


WHY SOLA

 - $21M raised from top-tier VCs (a16z, Conviction, YCombinator) and growing incredibly fast

 - Proven traction with Fortune 100 customers, with horizontal applicability across a variety of domains (including finance, healthcare, legal, logistics, and more)

 - Leading-edge agentic AI tech, solving deep problems in partnership with the AI labs (ex. Anthropic https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:activity:7426684058077855744/?originTrackingId=gMllhO4VY3OEPmt2do6k3g%3D%3D, AWS AGI Lab https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:activity:7402073015020310528/)

 - Small team, early stage, with an opportunity for outsized impact on the company’s future

 - Work closely with founders Jessica Wu (ex-Citadel, Thriv

source_jobs.title: Founding Product Manager
source_jobs.description:
JOIN US IN BUILDING THE FUTURE OF DIGITAL WORK

At Sola, we’re transforming the way work is done. We’re developing AI agents that make powerful automation effortless, enabling any user to record a workflow and instantly scale it up to millions of executions.

Sola today powers enterprise workflows in Fortune 100 companies, with a horizontal platform that works across healthcare, finance, legal, logistics, and more. We’ve raised $21M in funding from a16z, Conviction (Sarah Guo), and Y Combinator, and are looking for passionate builders to help us continue to scale.

If you’re interested in being on the forefront of agentic automation, we’d love to hear from you!


WHAT TO EXPECT

Our goal is to bring Figma-level UI/UX excellence to enterprise AI workflow automation. Sola's automations run in real enterprise environments under complex constraints: they need to be intelligent and self-directed, but also predictable and consistent.

The questions you'll own are at the forefront of AI today:

 - From the execution perspective, what should an agent be trusted to do, where does a human stay in the loop, and how do we make non-deterministic models operate reliably at scale?

 - From the building perspective, how can we make automation at scale easy for users in the world’s largest enterprises? How do we make enterprise automation feel as intuitive and elegant as the best consumer and creative tools? How do we design experiences that help non-technical users understand complex workflows, collaborate across teams, and trust AI doing real work on their behalf?

As our first dedicated product hire, you'll partner closely with our CEO and Head of Engineering to turn a fast-moving space into a clear, opinionated roadmap, own features end-to-end from customer problem to shipped product, and help define not just what we build but how we do product as the team grows. This is a job for a builder, not a backlog manager.

We work in person at our NYC HQ, and you'll work directly with the founders to help shape the company's future.


WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Partner with our CEO, design, and engineering to set product strategy and own the roadmap, balancing near-term needs with long-term vision.

 - Drive features end-to-end: requirements, crisp specs, stakeholder alignment, and keeping design, engineering, and go-to-market in lockstep.

 - Talk to users constantly, turning their pain points into a clear sense of what's most valuable to build next.


WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - Sharp product judgment paired with genuine design taste: a high bar for elegant, simple user experiences, and the instinct to sweat the details.

 - Enough technical fluency to go deep on a genuinely technical product domain and partner with engineering as a peer.

 - A clear, concise communicator who brings structure to ambiguity and can represent both users and engineering tradeoffs to any audience.

 - AI fluency: you explore and prototype with the latest AI tools, and you can reason about model capabilities well enough to make product calls.

 - You're open to working 5 days a week out of our office in NYC (we'll cover relocation!)


WHY SOLA

 - $21M raised from top-tier VCs (a16z, Conviction, YCombinator) and growing incredibly fast

 - Proven traction with Fortune 100 customers, with horizontal applicability across a variety of domains (including finance, healthcare, legal, logistics, and more)

 - Leading-edge agentic AI tech, solving deep problems in partnership with the AI labs (ex. Anthropic https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:activity:7426684058077855744/?originTrackingId=gMllhO4VY3OEPmt2do6k3g%3D%3D, AWS AGI Lab https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:activity:7402073015020310528/)

 - Small team, early stage, with an opportunity for outsized impact on the company’s future

 - Work closely with founders Jessica Wu (ex-Citadel, Thrive Capital) and Neil Deshmukh (MIT Quest for Intelligence Lab), alongside David Fullerton (ex-CTO Heap, Stack Overflow)


COMP

source_jobs.title: Software Engineer, Backend
source_jobs.description:
JOIN US IN BUILDING THE FUTURE OF DIGITAL WORK

At Sola, we’re transforming the way work is done. We’re developing AI agents that make powerful automation effortless, enabling any user to record a workflow and instantly scale it up to millions of executions.

Sola today powers enterprise workflows in Fortune 100 companies, with a horizontal platform that works across healthcare, finance, legal, logistics, and more. We’ve raised $21M in funding from a16z, Conviction (Sarah Guo), and Y Combinator, and are looking for passionate engineers to help us continue to scale.

If you’re interested in being on the forefront of agentic automation, we’d love to hear from you!


WHAT TO EXPECT

We‘re solving one of the most interesting problems in AI today: building reliable, deterministic execution on top of non-deterministic AI models.

As a backend engineer, you’ll work directly on our AI orchestration systems to enable reliable, scalable, durable workflow execution across desktop and web. You’ll collaborate with our frontend team to surface that to the user in a way that is easy and intuitive.

This is an opportunity to join a small, tight-knit team at our HQ in NYC. We believe the best work happens in person, especially at the early stage, and you’ll have the opportunity to learn from the founding team and early engineers to help shape the future of the company.


WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Own systems that automate repetitive work across browser and desktop, handling concurrency, reliability, and observability at scale (millions of executions per month)

 - Collaborate with our CTO and ML research partners to bring state-of-the-art agentic workflows into production

 - Architect and build the backend systems that power our visual workflow builder – a Figma-style interface used daily by non-technical ops teams

 - Design and implement services that integrate with Sola AI models to generate workflows, gain insights, and drive adaptive execution logic


WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - You thrive in a fast-paced environment where you can ship fast and solve problems end-to-end

 - You’ve built and operated distributed systems at scale, with a high standard for reliability, observability, and performance

 - You’re proficient across all layers on the backend, from infra to CI/CD to DB to backend service architecture

 - You’re fluent with the latest AI coding tools and are always looking for ways to move faster

 - You’re open to working 5 days a week out of our office in NYC (we’ll cover relocation!)


YOU MIGHT EXCEL IF

 - You have hands-on experience operating at an early stage startup where ownership and execution in the face of ambiguity were essential

 - You’re an expert in some or all of our stack: TypeScript and Python, Kubernetes, Temporal, Postgres, DynamoDB

 - You’ve worked directly on AI systems or in ML ops at scale

 - You’re ambitious, creative, and a great communicator


WHY SOLA

 - $21M raised from top-tier VCs (a16z, Conviction, YCombinator) and growing incredibly fast

 - Proven traction with Fortune 100 customers, with horizontal applicability across a variety of domains (including finance, healthcare, legal, logistics, and more)

 - Leading-edge agentic AI tech, solving deep problems in partnership with the AI labs (ex. Anthropic https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:activity:7426684058077855744/?originTrackingId=gMllhO4VY3OEPmt2do6k3g%3D%3D, AWS AGI Lab https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:activity:7402073015020310528/)

 - Small team, early stage, with an opportunity for outsized impact on the company’s future

 - Work closely with founders Jessica Wu (ex-Citadel, Thrive Capital) and Neil Deshmukh (MIT Quest for Intelligence Lab), alongside David Fullerton (ex-CTO Heap, Stack Overflow)


COMPENSATION & BENEFITS

Sola offers competitive salary plus meaningful equity at Series A stage. Exact compensation is based on experience and level.

We offer comprehensive medical, dental, and vision benefits, 401(k) matching,

source_jobs.title: Founding Recruiter
source_jobs.description:
What we're doing

Sola is building an agentic automation platform to support the enterprises of tomorrow. In order to deliver the experience we want, we’ve reimagined enterprise process automation to effortlessly and safely apply foundation AI models at scale across web and desktop interfaces.

In just one year, Sola has been adopted by Fortune 500 companies, top U.S. law firms, and some of the largest private enterprises across industries like finance, healthcare, legal, and supply chain.

Our team is based in NYC and includes industry leaders who have built and scaled businesses, contributed to the largest quantitative funds, crypto projects, and research labs, and have been founders themselves. We’ve raised our Series A from a Tier-1 VC and Conviction, with additional backing from the founders and CEOs of Dropbox, Zoom, Zapier, Scale, and more.

Sola’s workflow automation product is just the first step – our hardest challenges lie ahead. If you’re excited to solve some of the world’s most critical automation problems, we’d love to hear from you.

Who we are

Sola was founded in 2023 by Jessica Wu and Neil Deshmukh, who were previously at MIT and have experienced firsthand the RPA pain point within their previous experiences in finance and healthcare (prev. at IBM-Watson, MGH, BWH, Citadel Securities, Goldentree AM), and have extensive research experience in relevant areas (published in NeurIps/IEEE for research on multimodal models, computer vision, and robotics).

We’ve raised 20M+ in funding to date (most recently a Series A from a Tier-1 VC and Conviction), with additional backing from Y Combinator (S23 batch) and the founders and CEOs of Dropbox, Zoom, Zapier, Scale, and more.

What you’ll be doing

As a Founding Recruiter, you will:

 - Build and manage full-cycle recruiting pipelines across technical and non-technical roles

 - Own sourcing - writing great outreach, tracking funnel performance, and adapting quickly

 - Partner directly with hiring managers (including the CEO) to define needs, set strategy, and close top talent

 - Clearly communicate Sola’s mission and momentum to candidates - getting them excited to join early

 - Deliver a thoughtful, high-touch candidate experience from first message to final offer

Qualifications

We are looking for applicants with these skills:

 - 2–5 years of in-house recruiting experience, including at least 2 years focused on technical roles

 - Proven ability to source and close top engineering talent, especially for hard-to-fill roles

 - Are familiar with the AI/ML talent landscape

 - Strong written and verbal communication skills

 - Must be available in NYC

Benefits

🌇 Where: Strongly preferred in-person (NYC) with covered relocation. We believe the best work happens in person!

💸 Compensation: We hire exceptional people and pay them well. Every role includes competitive salary and meaningful equity

🩺 Healthcare: Comprehensive medical, dental, and vision coverage on par with Big Tech

📈 401k: Easy enrollment with smart options to help you save for the future

🍽️ Meals: Daily lunches, dinners, and snacks so you can stay focused on work

🏝️Time Off: Up to four weeks of flexible PTO

source_jobs.title: Software Engineer, Windows AI Automation
source_jobs.description:
JOIN US IN BUILDING THE FUTURE OF DIGITAL WORK

At Sola, we’re transforming the way work is done. We’re developing AI agents that make powerful automation effortless, enabling any user to record a workflow and instantly scale it up to millions of executions.

Sola today powers enterprise workflows in Fortune 100 companies, with a horizontal platform that works across healthcare, finance, legal, logistics, and more. We’ve raised $21M in funding from a16z, Conviction (Sarah Guo), and Y Combinator, and are looking for passionate engineers to help us continue to scale.

If you’re interested in being on the forefront of agentic automation, we’d love to hear from you!


WHAT TO EXPECT

We're solving one of the most interesting problems in AI today: building reliable, deterministic execution on top of non-deterministic AI models.

The desktop is the most challenging frontier of computer use automation. Modern enterprise environments mix legacy Win32 software, Citrix virtual desktops, and modern .NET applications, each requiring a different approach to perception and control. We're looking for a scrappy generalist to lead this work, someone comfortable across Windows / .NET and Linux server-side, excited to move between the desktop controller, the VM platform, and server-side AI execution.

This role is open to full-time remote or in-person at our HQ in New York. Our team today is split between both. If you're in New York (or open to relocating) you'll be in-person every day with a tight-knit founding team. If you're remote, you'll have the opportunity to come to NY for frequent meetups when we bring the remote teams together.


WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Lead our desktop automation platform, setting technical direction across the desktop controller, the VM platform, and server-side AI execution

 - Build and operate the desktop controller and the Windows VM fleet it runs on: session management, remote access, screen capture, and integration with the AI pipeline

 - Move across the Windows / .NET stack and Linux server-side as the project demands, partnering with backend & AI-focused engineers as needed

 - Drive reliability and observability across the desktop platform


WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - You've shipped production software and are comfortable with Windows / .NET development, not afraid to drop into Win32 or COM when needed

 - You're a generalist at heart, excited to move across different parts of the stack, with strong instincts about how to build in reliability and observability end-to-end

 - You're interested in being in-person 5 days a week in our NY office (we'll cover relocation), or you have a proven track record of working remotely (self-motivated, proactive, and a great communicator)


YOU MIGHT EXCEL IF

 - You have deep knowledge of Windows desktop internals: accessibility APIs (UIA, MSAA), Win32, COM, or remote desktop protocols (VNC/RFB, RDP)

 - You have experience deploying Windows applications at scale or operating Windows VM fleets

 - You're an expert in some or all of our stack: TypeScript, Python, .NET / C#, Appium, VNC/RFB, Tailscale, Temporal, Kubernetes


WHY SOLA

 - $21M raised from top-tier VCs (a16z, Conviction, YCombinator) and growing incredibly fast

 - Proven traction with Fortune 100 customers, with horizontal applicability across a variety of domains (including finance, healthcare, legal, logistics, and more)

 - Leading-edge agentic AI tech, solving deep problems in partnership with the AI labs (ex. Anthropic https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:activity:7426684058077855744/?originTrackingId=gMllhO4VY3OEPmt2do6k3g%3D%3D, AWS AGI Lab https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:activity:7402073015020310528/)

 - Small team, early stage, with an opportunity for outsized impact on the company’s future

 - Work closely with founders Jessica Wu (ex-Citadel, Thrive Capital) and Neil Deshmukh (MIT Quest for Intelligence Lab), alongside David Fullerton (ex-CTO Heap, Stack Overflow)


COMPENSATION & B

source_jobs.title: Software Engineer, ML Platform
source_jobs.description:
JOIN US IN BUILDING THE FUTURE OF DIGITAL WORK

At Sola, we’re transforming the way work is done. We’re developing AI agents that make powerful automation effortless, enabling any user to record a workflow and instantly scale it up to millions of executions.

Sola today powers enterprise workflows in Fortune 100 companies, with a horizontal platform that works across healthcare, finance, legal, logistics, and more. We’ve raised $21M in funding from a16z, Conviction (Sarah Guo), and Y Combinator, and are looking for passionate engineers to help us continue to scale.

If you’re interested in being on the forefront of agentic automation, we’d love to hear from you!


WHAT TO EXPECT

We‘re solving one of the most interesting problems in AI today: building reliable, deterministic execution on top of non-deterministic AI models.

As one of our first dedicated ML platform hires, you'll work directly with our CTO to bring state-of-the-art AI capabilities into production. This is an engineering role, not a research role. You'll own the systems that make our AI reliable, observable, and scalable, turning AI research into production features.

This is an opportunity to join a small, tight-knit team at our HQ in NYC. We believe the best work happens in person, especially at the early stage, and you'll have the opportunity to learn from the founding team and early engineers to help shape the future of the company.


WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Partner directly with our CTO to turn AI research and experiments into production-grade features

 - Investigate and prototype new AI capabilities, taking early-stage ideas and quickly determining what's feasible to build and ship

 - Build observability and evals infrastructure so we can monitor models in production and measure whether they're succeeding

 - Take ownership of AI features end-to-end, from design through deployment and monitoring, collaborating with other teams as needed to bring features to production


WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - You have 3+ years of experience as an engineer, including recent work on cutting-edge ML and AI systems

 - You've owned production AI features end-to-end, from experimentation to maintaining live production infrastructure

 - You're proficient in Python with hands-on experience in modern ML frameworks (e.g. PyTorch, HuggingFace, DSPy)

 - You're open to working 5 days a week out of our office in NYC (we'll cover relocation!)


YOU MIGHT EXCEL IF

 - You have hands-on experience operating at an early stage startup where ownership and execution in the face of ambiguity were essential

 - You bring an ML research background on top of your engineering skills, particularly in areas relevant to Sola (e.g. CUA, agentic reasoning, visual grounding, VLMs, fine-tuning)

 - You're an expert in some or all of our stack: Typescript, Python, DSPy, vLLM / TensorRT, Temporal, Kubernetes

 - You're ambitious, creative, and a great communicator


WHY SOLA

 - $21M raised from top-tier VCs (a16z, Conviction, YCombinator) and growing incredibly fast

 - Proven traction with Fortune 100 customers, with horizontal applicability across a variety of domains (including finance, healthcare, legal, logistics, and more)

 - Leading-edge agentic AI tech, solving deep problems in partnership with the AI labs (ex. COMPENSATION & BENEFITS

Sola offers competitive salary plus meaningful equity at Series A stage. Exact compensation is based on experience and level.
